item.title: 伊朗战争引发美国页岩油企业股票抛售潮
item.description: 随着伊朗局势加剧市场波动，并导致其他领域的融资活动陷入停滞，美国上市油气生产商的股票抛售潮正使3月成为该行业六年来最繁忙的月份。【原文：Stock sales by US-listed oil and gas producers are making March the sector’s busiest month in more than six years as the war in Iran whips up volatility and stalls capital-raising activity from other corners of the market.】

item.title: 据称北约正考虑加强土耳其空军基地的导弹防御系统
item.description: 据知情人士透露，北约正考虑进一步加强其在土耳其的弹道导弹防御能力，以应对来自邻国伊朗的威胁。【原文：NATO is looking into reinforcing further its ballistic missile defense capacity in Turkey against threats from neighboring Iran, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 信实集团与三星签署30亿美元绿色氨供应协议
item.description: 随着亿万富翁穆克什·安巴尼大力推进可再生能源业务布局，信实工业有限公司与韩国三星C&T公司签署了一项价值30亿美元的绿色氨供应协议。【原文：Reliance Industries Ltd. signed a $3 billion agreement with South Korea’s Samsung C&T Corp. for supplying green ammonia, as billionaire Mukesh Ambani pushes to build a renewable energy portfolio.】

item.title: 伦敦金属交易所正致力于解决问题，此前其交易曾一度暂停
item.description: 伦敦金属交易所所有合约的交易均已暂停，交易商无法在从铝到锌的各个市场下单，他们正在等待有关此次系统故障原因的进一步消息。【原文：Trading has been halted in all contracts on the London Metal Exchange, with dealers unable to place orders in markets ranging from aluminum to zinc as they awaited further information on the cause of the outage.】

item.title: 美银警告：市场可能低估了伊朗风险
item.description: 美国银行证券全球经济学家安东尼奥·加布里埃尔表示，投资者可能低估了伊朗战争可能引发全球经济动荡的程度。【原文：Investors may be underestimating the extent to which the Iran war can trigger global economic turbulence, according to Bank of America Securities global economist Antonio Gabriel.】

item.title: 英格兰银行裁减高管，75人获15万英镑离职补偿金
item.description: 在英格兰银行实施自愿离职计划后，75名员工获得了最高15万英镑（20万美元）的补偿金，此次计划导致该行多名高管离职。【原文：Seventy-five Bank of England staff received the maximum £150,000 ($200,000) payout after volunteering for layoffs that ended in many senior departures from the UK central bank.】

item.title: 随着当地居民陆续离境，阿联酋航空正驾驶几乎空无一人的航班飞回迪拜
item.description: 由于旅客纷纷避开波斯湾地区，阿联酋航空飞往迪拜的航班有时几乎空无一人，这凸显了这家全球最大的国际航空公司在持久战背景下恢复航线网络所面临的挑战。【原文：Emirates is operating flights to Dubai that are near-empty in some cases as travelers avoid the Persian Gulf, highlighting the challenges for the world’s largest international airline to restore its network amid a protracted war.】

item.title: 国际能源署表示，如有需要，其尚有更多应急石油储备可用
item.description: 国际能源署上周同意释放创纪录规模的紧急石油储备，该机构表示，如有需要，还可进一步释放更多储备。【原文：The International Energy Agency, which last week agreed to a record release of emergency oil reserves, said it has more that can be made available if needed.】

item.title: Public Storage以105亿美元收购National Storage
item.description: Public Storage Corp. 已同意以全股票交易方式收购 National Storage Affiliates Trust，交易总值（含债务）约为 105 亿美元。随着该行业在疫情期间经历繁荣后进入整合阶段，此举将扩大这家自助仓储巨头的全美业务版图。National Storage 股价一度上涨 32%。【原文：Public Storage Corp. agreed to acquire National Storage Affiliates Trust in an all-stock deal worth about $10.5 billion, including debt, expanding the self-storage giant’s footprint across the US as the sector consolidates following a pandemic-era boom. National Storage gained as much as 32%.】

item.title: 美联储期权交易获利1000万美元，因油价波动颠覆降息预期
item.description: 本月油价的飙升以及市场对美联储宽松政策预期降温，使一项针对短期利率的期权交易获利1000万美元。【原文：This month’s surge in oil prices and the market’s move to ratchet back expectations for Federal Reserve policy easing have generated a $10 million profit for one options bet in short-term interest rates.】

item.title: 苹果推出售价549美元的AirPods Max 2耳机，支持实时翻译和更出色的降噪功能
item.description: 苹果公司推出了AirPods Max 2，对其头戴式耳机进行了升级，不仅增强了降噪性能，还加入了近年来已在AirPods Pro系列中推出的多项功能。【原文：Apple Inc. introduced the AirPods Max 2, upgrading its over-ear headphones with more powerful noise cancellation and a handful of features that have already rolled out to the AirPods Pro line in recent years.】

item.title: 塞勒的策略推动优先股在最新一轮比特币购买中销量激增
item.description: 迈克尔·塞勒（Michael Saylor）旗下的Strategy Inc.公司购入了价值近16亿美元的比特币——这是该公司自1月以来最大规模的购入——并更加倚重一种向投资者承诺年化收益率为11.5%的证券，该证券由同一款加密货币提供支持。【原文：Michael Saylor’s Strategy Inc. bought nearly $1.6 billion worth of Bitcoin - the company’s largest purchase since January – leaning more heavily on a security promising investors an 11.5% annual payout backed by the same cryptocurrency.】

item.title: 贝森特告诉CNBC：美国正允许伊朗继续出口石油
item.description: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特周一告诉CNBC，美国允许伊朗继续通过霍尔木兹海峡运输石油。【原文：The US is letting Iran continue to ship its oil via the Strait of Hormuz, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent told CNBC on Monday.】

item.title: 美中两国正考虑设立“贸易委员会”以管理双边经济关系
item.description: 中美两国正在考虑建立一种新机制，该机制有望对两国之间的经济联系进行监督，并处理这两个地缘经济竞争对手之间的双边关切。【原文：The US and China are considering a new mechanism that could potentially oversee economic ties and manage bilateral concerns between the two geoeconomic competitors.】

item.title: 数据中心在建筑支出结构中超越办公楼
item.description: 美国数据中心项目的支出呈现爆发式增长，去年年底首次超过了办公楼建设支出。当Meta Platforms Inc.在俄亥俄州哥伦布市郊外建设一个计算中心时，马特·昆兹就早早察觉到了这一趋势。【原文：Spending on data center projects in the US has exploded, surpassing offices for the first time at the end of last year. It’s a trend Matt Kunz saw early on when Meta Platforms Inc. built a computing hub outside Columbus, Ohio.】

item.title: 高盛资产管理公司为最新次级债务基金设定130亿美元募集目标
item.description: 据知情人士透露，高盛资产管理公司正筹备一只新的夹层债务基金，旨在从信贷市场的动荡中获利。【原文：Goldman Sachs Asset Management is preparing a new mezzanine debt fund designed to profit from disruptions in credit markets, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 随着油价从近期高点回落，美国国债加入全球债券上涨行情
item.description: 随着油价从近期高位回落，美国国债价格上涨，这缓解了市场对其通胀潜力的担忧；但油价仍维持在较高水平，引发了人们对能源价格高企将拖累经济增长的担忧。【原文：Treasuries gained as oil prices retreated from recent highs, allaying concern about their inflationary potential, while remaining at levels that are stoking concern elevated energy prices will slow economic growth.】

item.title: 美国天然气价格震荡，交易员权衡寒冷天气与油价下跌的影响
item.description: 美国天然气期货价格在小幅涨跌之间波动，交易员一方面权衡天气预报显示气温将转冷——这意味着未来几周用于供暖和发电的燃料需求将增加——另一方面又关注油价的下跌。【原文：US natural gas futures swung between slight gains and losses as traders weighed a cold shift in weather forecasts, indicating higher demand for the heating and power-plant fuel in the coming weeks, against falling oil prices.】

item.title: 在伊朗战争的连锁反应尚未显现之际，尼日利亚通胀压力有所缓解
item.description: 尼日利亚2月份的年度通胀率略有回落，这让消费者在因伊朗战争导致燃油价格和交通成本上涨之前，获得了一丝暂时的喘息之机。【原文：Nigeria’s annual inflation rate eased marginally in February, giving consumers a small measure of temporary respite before fuel prices and transport costs began rising due to the Iran war.】

item.title: 首席执行官表示，Simpar正通过“以更少资源做更多事”来降低债务
item.description: Simpar SA的负责人表示，近期宣布的增资标志着该公司发展方向的转变，在经历了多年的快速扩张后，公司将致力于增加现金流并降低债务。【原文：Simpar SA’s head said a recently announced capital increase has marked a shift for the company, which will focus on generating more cash and lowering debt after years of rapid expansion.】

item.title: LandSec交易告吹，因Sculptor要求降价
item.description: 兰德证券集团（Land Securities Group Plc）出售伦敦维多利亚区一栋办公楼的交易已告吹，原因是潜在买家在最后一刻要求降价。【原文：Land Securities Group Plc’s deal to sell an office building in London’s Victoria district has collapsed after the potential buyer sought a last minute price reduction.】

item.title: OpenAI正与私募股权公司商讨成立一家100亿美元的合资企业
item.description: 据知情人士透露，OpenAI正与包括TPG公司和贝恩资本在内的私募股权公司就成立合资企业进行深入磋商，该合资企业将致力于推动其人工智能软件的普及。【原文：OpenAI is in advanced discussions to form a joint venture with private equity firms, including TPG Inc. and Bain Capital, that would focus on bolstering adoption of its AI software, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 瑞银表示，奢侈品股面临数年来的最悲观情绪
item.description: 瑞银分析师指出，随着中东战争可能推迟人们期待已久的需求复苏，投资者对欧洲奢侈品股的看法已降至数年来的最低点。【原文：Investors have adopted the most pessimistic outlook on European luxury stocks in years as the war in the Middle East threatens to delay a long-expected rebound in demand, according to UBS analysts.】

item.title: 受巴西丰收预期提振，罗布斯塔咖啡价格逼近七个月低点
item.description: 罗布斯塔咖啡价格在跌至七个月低点后趋于稳定，此前市场预期巴西高端阿拉比卡咖啡豆产量将创下纪录，这可能缓解对价格较低的罗布斯塔咖啡豆的需求。【原文：Robusta coffee steadied after falling to a seven-month low on expectations of record Brazilian output of high-end arabica beans, which could ease demand for the cheaper variety.】

item.title: 亚德尼对备受推崇的逆向投资股票买入信号持怀疑态度
item.description: 上周末股市的氛围，正是逆向投资者梦寐以求的那种。【原文：The mood in the stock market by the end of last week was the type of stuff that contrarian investors dream about.】

item.title: 日益壮大的油轮船队正从红海寻求绕过霍尔木兹海峡的石油运输路线
item.description: 随着霍尔木兹海峡这一关键水道实际上已对航运关闭，利雅得正加紧努力绕过该海峡，目前有大量油轮正在沙特阿拉伯位于红海的主要港口等待装运原油。【原文：A huge number of tankers are now waiting to collect oil from Saudi Arabia’s key port in the Red Sea as Riyadh ramps up its efforts to bypass the Strait of Hormuz after the vital waterway was effectively closed to shipping.】

item.title: 美国工业生产因工厂和采矿业产出增加而上升
item.description: 受制造业和采矿业产出连续第二个月增长的提振，美国2月份工业生产小幅上升。【原文：US industrial production rose modestly in February, lifted by a second month of gains in manufacturing and mining output.】

item.title: LSEG启动美国高评级美元债券发行以进行债务再融资
item.description: 伦敦证券交易所集团已启动美元债券发行，旨在为债务再融资，这也使得投资级债券市场今日的发行规模预计将十分庞大。【原文：London Stock Exchange Group Plc has kicked off the sale of US dollar bonds as it looks to refinance debt, adding to what is set to be a heavy day of issuance in the investment-grade debt market.】

item.title: 花旗聘请摩根士丹利的法里纳担任基础设施融资联席主管
item.description: 据彭博新闻社查阅的一份备忘录显示，花旗集团已聘请摩根士丹利银行家埃里克·法里纳担任基础设施融资与资本解决方案全球联席主管。【原文：Citigroup Inc. has hired Morgan Stanley banker Eric Farina as global co-head of infrastructure financing and capital solutions, according to a memo reviewed by Bloomberg News.】

item.title: 贝森特称美国未干预能源衍生品市场
item.description: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，尽管中东冲突导致原油期货价格升至近四年来的最高点，但美国并未干预能源衍生品市场。【原文：The US has not intervened in energy derivatives markets, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said, after the Middle East conflict pushed crude futures to the highest in almost four years.】
